Supplementary Materials
Does Body Image Distortion Mediate the Link Between Adolescent Bullying and Depression in Early Adulthood? Evidence From a National Irish Cohort

S1. Missing Data Handling
S1. 缺失数据处理

Missing data rates for most analytic variables were low (<<<1%). The exceptions were social class (9.5% missing) and equivalised income quintile (9.3% missing), both of which reflect household-level survey non-response rather than item-level refusal. All other variables—including the outcome (CES-D8), exposure (bullying), mediator (body image distortion), and prior depression (age 13)—had complete or near-complete data.
大多数分析变量的缺失数据率很低（0.1%）。例外情况是社会阶层（缺失 9.5%）和等值收入五分位数（缺失 9.3%），这两项缺失数据均反映的是家庭层面的调查无应答，而非项目层面的拒绝回答。所有其他变量——包括结果变量（CES-D8）、暴露因素（欺凌）、中介因素（身体意象扭曲）和既往抑郁症史（13 岁时）——均具有完整或接近完整的数据。

We employed the missRanger package in R (Mayer 2019) for imputation. This approach uses random forests with predictive mean matching (PMM, kkk = 5), which preserves the empirical distribution of each variable and avoids imputing values outside the observed range. The imputation model included all analytic variables (except the case identifier and sampling weights) as predictors, with 100 trees per forest and a fixed random seed for reproducibility.
我们使用 R 语言中的 missRanger 包（Mayer 2019）进行插补。该方法采用随机森林算法，并结合预测均值匹配（PMM， kkk = 5），从而保留每个变量的经验分布，避免插补超出观测范围的值。插补模型包含所有分析变量（除个案标识符和抽样权重外）作为预测因子，每个森林包含 100 棵树，并使用固定的随机种子以确保结果的可重复性。

To verify that imputation did not influence the substantive conclusions, we conducted a complete-case sensitivity analysis (NNN = 4,511), which produced substantively identical results (Table [tab:complete_case]). The pattern of significant path bbb coefficients for BID categories and the overall KHB confounding percentage were consistent with the imputed-data results.
为了验证插补是否影响实质性结论，我们进行了完全病例敏感性分析（ NNN = 4,511），结果与插补数据基本一致（表[tab:complete_case]）。BID 类别和总体 KHB 混杂百分比的显著路径 bbb 系数模式与插补数据的结果一致。

S2. Attrition Analysis  S2. 损耗分析

Of the 7,525 respondents who participated at Wave 2 (age 13), 4,584 (60.9%) were retained in the analytic sample at Wave 4 (age 20) with valid body image data. The remaining 2,941 (39.1%) were lost to attrition or excluded due to missing BID data.
在第二阶段（13 岁）参与调查的 7525 名受访者中，有 4584 名（60.9%）在第四阶段（20 岁）的分析样本中保留下来，并拥有有效的身体形象数据。其余 2941 名（39.1%）因失访或缺失身体形象数据而被排除。

Table [tab:attrition] compares retained and attrited respondents on Wave 2 characteristics. A logistic regression predicting retention showed that females were modestly more likely to be retained (OR = 1.10, ppp = .045) and higher BMI at age 13 was associated with lower retention probability. Critically, bullying victimization at age 13 did not significantly predict attrition (OR = 0.94, ppp = .454), suggesting that differential loss of bullied youth is unlikely to bias the mediation estimates. Prior depression was also unrelated to retention.
表[tab:attrition]比较了第二波调查中保留受访者和流失受访者的特征。预测保留率的逻辑回归分析显示，女性的保留率略高于男性（OR = 1.10， ppp = .045），而 13 岁时较高的 BMI 与较低的保留率相关。值得注意的是，13 岁时遭受欺凌并不能显著预测流失（OR = 0.94， ppp = .454），这表明遭受欺凌的青少年流失率差异不太可能对中介效应估计产生偏差。既往抑郁症也与保留率无关。

While these results are reassuring, we acknowledge that attrition may be selective on unmeasured characteristics (e.g., family instability, mobility). The use of longitudinal sampling weights (WGT_20YRb) in descriptive analyses partially adjusts for observed predictors of attrition.
尽管这些结果令人欣慰，但我们也承认，样本流失可能存在选择性，主要取决于一些未测量的特征（例如，家庭不稳定、流动性）。在描述性分析中使用纵向抽样权重（WGT_20YRb）可以部分调整观察到的样本流失预测因素。

S3. Detailed Sensitivity Analyses
S3. 详细敏感性分析

All main models control for prior depression at age 13 (CES-D continuous). We conducted a series of sensitivity analyses to assess the robustness of the mediation findings (Table [tab:sensitivity]).
所有主要模型均控制了 13 岁时的抑郁症状（CES-D 连续变量）。我们进行了一系列敏感性分析，以评估中介效应结果的稳健性（表[tab:sensitivity]）。

S3.1 Alternative Depression Outcome
S3.1 抑郁症的替代结局

Using binary depression (CES-D8 threshold) as the outcome in a logistic KHB model, the total effect of bullying frequency remained significant (log-odds = 0.165, ppp <<< .001), and the confounding percentage through categorical BID was 10.30%, consistent with the significant overall mediation observed in the main OLS analysis.
在逻辑 KHB 模型中使用二元抑郁（CES-D8 阈值）作为结果，欺凌频率的总效应仍然显著（对数比值 = 0.165， ppp <<< .001），通过分类 BID 的混淆百分比为 10.30%，与主要 OLS 分析中观察到的显著总体中介一致。

S3.2 Alternative BID Operationalizations
S3.2 替代投标操作方案

Two alternative BID specifications were tested:
我们测试了两种不同的招标规范：

Continuous BID (zzz-score). Using the standardized residual as a continuous predictor (rather than categorized into five groups), the KHB confounding percentage was only 0.84%. This confirms that the categorical specification better captures the non-linear relationship between distortion and depression, as different distortion categories show varying magnitudes of association with depression that are obscured by a linear specification.
连续型 BID（ zzz 分数）。使用标准化残差作为连续预测变量（而非将其分为五组），KHB 混杂百分比仅为 0.84%。这证实了分类模型能更好地捕捉认知扭曲与抑郁之间的非线性关系，因为不同的认知扭曲类别与抑郁的关联程度各不相同，而线性模型则掩盖了这种关联。

Directional BID (3 categories). Collapsing BID into three categories—under-perception (<<< −-−1SD), accurate (±\pm±1SD), and over-perception (>>> +1SD)—produced consistent results. The directional specification captured less granularity than the five-category approach, particularly by combining moderate and extreme distortion levels.
定向 BID（3 类）。将 BID 简化为三类——感知不足（ <<< −-− 1 个标准差）、准确（ ±\pm± 1 个标准差）和感知过度（ >>> +1 个标准差）——得到了一致的结果。与五类方法相比，定向分类的精细度较低，尤其是在合并中度和极度失真水平时。

S3.3 Alternative Exposures
S3.3 其他暴露途径

Binary bullying (any vs. none) showed a significant total effect on depression (bbb = 1.548, ppp <<< .001) with a confounding percentage of 4.52%. Appearance-based bullying—a theoretically more proximal exposure for body image pathways—showed a total effect of bbb = 2.098 (ppp <<< .001) with a confounding percentage of 2.86%. Both alternative exposures confirmed the pattern observed with bullying frequency: a robust total effect with a significant proportion attributable to mediation through BID.
二元欺凌（有欺凌 vs. 无欺凌）对抑郁症有显著的总效应（ bbb = 1.548， ppp <<< .001），混杂因素占比为 4.52%。基于外貌的欺凌——理论上是身体意象通路更直接的暴露因素——的总效应为 bbb = 2.098（ ppp <<< .001），混杂因素占比为 2.86%。这两种替代暴露因素均证实了欺凌频率所观察到的模式：总效应显著，且其中相当一部分可归因于身体意象障碍的中介作用。

S3.4 BID ×\times× Sex Interaction
S3.4 BID ×\times× 性互动

The interaction between categorical BID and sex was tested in an OLS model predicting depression (controlling for prior depression). The overall BID ×\times× Sex interaction was statistically significant (ppp = .011), indicating that the association between body image distortion categories and depression differs by sex. This finding corroborates the sex-stratified KHB results, which showed that mediation operated through different BID categories for females (18.39%, driven by over-perception) and males (6.28%, driven by extreme under- and over-perception).
在预测抑郁症的 OLS 模型中（控制既往抑郁症），检验了分类 BID 与性别之间的交互作用。总体而言，BID ×\times× 性别交互作用具有统计学意义（ ppp = .011），表明身体意象扭曲类别与抑郁症之间的关联因性别而异。这一发现与按性别分层的 KHB 结果相符，后者显示，中介作用是通过不同的 BID 类别实现的，女性为 18.39%（主要由过度感知驱动），男性为 6.28%（主要由极度感知不足和过度感知驱动）。

S3.5 Models Without Prior Depression Control
S3.5 未进行抑郁症控制的模型

As a comparison, we also estimated models excluding prior depression from the control set. Without prior depression adjustment, the total effect of bullying frequency was larger (bbb = 0.738, ppp <<< .001) but the confounding percentage was smaller (5.38%). This contrast illustrates that controlling for prior depression attenuates the total effect more than the indirect effect, thereby increasing the relative contribution of BID to the remaining bullying–depression association. The pattern of significant disentangled indirect effects was consistent across both specifications, with extreme over-perception as the largest mediating pathway in both cases.
作为对比，我们还估计了排除既往抑郁症对照组的模型。在未调整既往抑郁症的情况下，欺凌频率的总效应更大（ bbb = 0.738， ppp <<< .001），但混淆比例更小（5.38%）。这一对比表明，控制既往抑郁症对总效应的减弱作用大于对间接效应的减弱作用，从而增加了 BID 对剩余欺凌-抑郁关联的相对贡献。两种模型设定下，显著的、分离的间接效应模式一致，其中极端的过度感知在两种情况下都是最大的中介路径。

S4. Body Image Distortion: Construction Details
S4. 身体形象扭曲：结构细节

The regression residual method for constructing BID proceeded as follows:
采用回归残差法构建 BID 的步骤如下：

  1. Respondents at Wave 3 (age 17) reported their subjective body perception on a 5-point scale: (1) very skinny, (2) a bit skinny, (3) just the right size, (4) a bit overweight, (5) very overweight.
    第三波调查的受访者（17 岁）用 5 分制量表报告了他们的主观身体感知：（1）非常瘦，（2）有点瘦，（3）身材正好，（4）有点超重，（5）非常超重。

  2. Objectively measured BMI was calculated from interviewer-measured height and weight using calibrated equipment at the Wave 3 interview.
    在第三次访谈中，访谈员使用校准设备测量身高和体重，并根据测量结果计算出客观测量的 BMI。

  3. Separate OLS regressions were estimated for males and females: Body Perceptioni=β0+β1⋅BMIi+β2⋅BMIi2+ϵi\begin{equation*} \text{Body Perception}_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \cdot \text{BMI}_i + \beta_2 \cdot \text{BMI}_i^2 + \epsilon_i \end{equation*}Body Perceptioni​=β0​+β1​⋅BMIi​+β2​⋅BMIi2​+ϵi​​ The quadratic term captures the curvilinear relationship between BMI and body perception (i.e., the perception scale may not be linearly related to BMI across the full range).
    分别对男性和女性估计了 OLS 回归： Body Perceptioni=β0+β1⋅BMIi+β2⋅BMIi2+ϵi\begin{equation*} \text{Body Perception}_i = \beta_0 + \beta_1 \cdot \text{BMI}_i + \beta_2 \cdot \text{BMI}_i^2 + \epsilon_i \end{equation*}Body Perceptioni​=β0​+β1​⋅BMIi​+β2​⋅BMIi2​+ϵi​​ 二次项捕捉了 BMI 和身体感知之间的曲线关系（即，感知量表可能与 BMI 在整个范围内没有线性关系）。

  4. The residual ϵ^i\hat{\epsilon}_iϵ^i​ represents the discrepancy between actual and expected body perception given BMI. Positive residuals indicate that the individual perceives themselves as heavier than their BMI would predict (over-perception); negative residuals indicate perceiving oneself as thinner than expected (under-perception).
    残差 ϵ^i\hat{\epsilon}_iϵ^i​ 表示根据 BMI 计算出的实际体型感知与预期体型感知之间的差异。正残差表示个体认为自己比 BMI 预测值更重（高估）；负残差表示个体认为自己比预期更瘦（低估）。

  5. Residuals were standardized within sex (mean = 0, SD = 1) to create the continuous BID zzz-score.
    将残差按性别进行标准化（均值 = 0，标准差 = 1），以创建连续的 BID zzz 分数。

  6. The BID zzz-score was categorized into five groups:
    BID zzz 分数被分为五组：

    • Extreme Under-perception: z<−2z < -2z<−2
      极度低估： z<−2z < -2z<−2

    • Moderate Under-perception: −2≤z<−1-2 \leq z < -1−2≤z<−1
      中度低估： −2≤z<−1-2 \leq z < -1−2≤z<−1

    • Normal: −1≤z≤1-1 \leq z \leq 1−1≤z≤1  正常值： −1≤z≤1-1 \leq z \leq 1−1≤z≤1

    • Moderate Over-perception: 1<z≤21 < z \leq 21<z≤2
      中度过度感知： 1<z≤21 < z \leq 21<z≤2

    • Extreme Over-perception: z>2z > 2z>2
      极度过度感知： z>2z > 2z>2

By construction, BID is orthogonal to BMI within each sex, ensuring that the distortion measure captures perceptual inaccuracy rather than actual body size. The sex-specific estimation accounts for well-documented sex differences in the relationship between BMI and body perception.
根据构建方式，BID 与同一性别内的 BMI 正交，从而确保该畸变指标反映的是感知误差而非实际体型。这种性别特异性估计方法考虑了 BMI 与身体感知之间关系中已得到充分证实的性别差异。

S5. KHB Decomposition: Technical Details

The Karlson-Holm-Breen (KHB) method (Karlson et al. 2012; Breen et al. 2013) addresses the problem of comparing coefficients across nested models, which is especially problematic in non-linear models (logit, probit) where coefficient magnitudes are confounded with the error variance (scale). Even in linear models, the KHB method provides a clean decomposition of confounding versus mediation.

The method works by:

  1. Estimating the reduced model: Y=α+cX+γ′W+ϵY = \alpha + cX + \gamma'\mathbf{W} + \epsilonY=α+cX+γ′W+ϵ

  2. Regressing the mediator(s) ZZZ on XXX and obtaining the residuals Z~\tilde{Z}Z~

  3. Estimating a full model that replaces ZZZ with Z~\tilde{Z}Z~: Y=α+c′X+bZ~+γ′W+ϵY = \alpha + c'X + b\tilde{Z} + \gamma'\mathbf{W} + \epsilonY=α+c′X+bZ~+γ′W+ϵ

  4. The indirect effect is c−c′c - c'c−c′, and the confounding percentage is (c−c′)/c×100(c - c') / c \times 100(c−c′)/c×100

The key insight is that replacing ZZZ with Z~\tilde{Z}Z~ (the part of ZZZ unrelated to XXX) ensures that the reduced and full models have the same error variance, making coefficient comparison valid even in non-linear models.

In our application, XXX = bullying frequency (0–4), ZZZ = four BID category dummies, and W\mathbf{W}W includes prior depression at age 13 plus demographic and physical health control variables specified as concomitants (sex, BMI, social class, income quintile, lone parent). Psychological variables (e.g., self-esteem, emotional stability) were deliberately excluded from W\mathbf{W}W to avoid over-controlling for constructs that may lie on the causal pathway between bullying and depression. The disentangle option decomposes the total indirect effect into contributions from each BID dummy.

All KHB analyses were conducted using the khb command in Stata SE 18 (Kohler et al. 2011).

Supplementary Tables

Breen, Richard, Kristian Bernt Karlson, and Anders Holm. 2013. “Total, Direct, and Indirect Effects in Logit and Probit Models.” Sociological Methods & Research 42 (2): 164–91. https://doi.org/10.1177/0049124113494572.
Karlson, Kristian Bernt, Anders Holm, and Richard Breen. 2012. “Comparing Regression Coefficients Between Same-Sample Nested Models Using Logit and Probit: A New Method.” Sociological Methodology 42 (1): 286–313. https://doi.org/10.1177/0081175012444861.
Kohler, Ulrich, Kristian Bernt Karlson, and Anders Holm. 2011. “Comparing Coefficients of Nested Nonlinear Probability Models.” The Stata Journal 11 (3): 420–38. https://doi.org/10.1177/1536867X1101100306.
Mayer, Michael. 2019. “missRanger—Fast Imputation of Missing Values.” R Package Version 2.1.0.
